notes: Solid, complete breakout implementation with proper collision detection, lives, scoring, and game states, but visuals are minimal (square ball, plain white paddle, no shimmer/gradient on bricks) and the 'BALL_ON_PADDLE' prompt text overlaps the play area awkwardly mid-game.

An exceptionally well-coded Breakout clone with robust AABB collision detection, proper paddle angle control, and a complete game loop; only minor flaws like slightly off-center bricks and the inability to move the paddle before launching the ball.

A solid but not fully polished Breakout clone: core loop, collisions, scoring, lives, and states work, but paddle cannot move while the ball is waiting to launch and control handling/state flow are a bit clunky.
